title: pinus fenzeliana var. dabeshanensis
intro: Pinus fenzeliana var. dabeshanensis, also known as Dabeshan Pine, is a rare and endangered species of pine tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Dabeshan Pine, such as decoctions and infusions, are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
